questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the effect of the Acquisition on competition, including whether Regis and Vault are close competitors and there are limited alternative suppliers.

Describe whether the Acquisition could affect competition in the supply of goods or services needed for gold production. For example, are there any important inputs that Regis and Vault acquire where the suppliers of those inputs have only a small number of other customers?
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Regis and Vault.
